# Kamalakar Heart Centre — AI-Readable Summary

## Practice
- Name: Kamalakar Heart Centre
- Type: Interventional Cardiology Clinic
- Location: Life Hospital, Old Club Road, Kothapet, Guntur, Andhra Pradesh 522001, India
- Landmark: Opposite AVR Hospital
- Website: https://kamalakarheartcentre.com
- Phone: +91-9959423566
- Email: info@kamalakarheartcentre.com
- Emergency: 24/7 cardiac emergency care available
- Insurance: Arogya Raksha, United Healthcare, Star Health, and others accepted

## Doctor
- Name: Dr. Kamalakar Kosaraju
- Role: Interventional Cardiologist
- Qualifications: M.D. (General Medicine) — Gold Medal, D.M. (Cardiology) — Osmania Medical College (OSM), FESC (Fellow of the European Society of Cardiology)
- Experience: 10+ years, 5,000+ cardiac procedures
- Success rate: 99%+ for angioplasty
- Languages spoken: English, Telugu

## Services
- Angiogram (Coronary Angiography): Diagnostic procedure using catheter to visualize heart arteries. Takes 30-60 minutes.
- Angioplasty (Percutaneous Coronary Intervention): Minimally invasive procedure to unblock arteries. 99%+ success rate.
- Pacemaker Implantation: Surgical procedure for irregular heartbeats. Recovery in 2-4 weeks.
- Heart Failure Management: Comprehensive treatment for weak heart muscles and fluid buildup.
- Hypertension Treatment: Personalized blood pressure management plans.
- Cholesterol Management: Expert treatment and prevention of heart disease from high cholesterol.
- ECG Test (Electrocardiogram): Heart rhythm and electrical activity diagnosis. Included in consultation fee.
- 2D Echocardiography: Ultrasound test to visualize heart structure and function.
- TMT (Treadmill) Test: Stress test to identify hidden cardiac issues.
- Emergency Cardiac Care (24/7): Immediate treatment for heart attacks and cardiac emergencies.

## Consultation
- OPD Hours: Monday to Saturday, 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM
- Sunday: Emergency only
- Initial consultation fee: Rs 500 (includes ECG and assessment)
- Telemedicine: Video consultations available for follow-ups
- Second opinions welcome

## Emergency Information
- 24/7 emergency cardiac care available
- Call: +91-9959423566 for immediate assistance
- Advanced cath-lab for emergency angioplasty
- Heart attack (chest pain, breathing difficulty) — seek immediate care

## Languages
- English
- Telugu (తెలుగు)

## Key Facts
- Located inside Life Hospital, a multi-specialty hospital in Guntur
- One of the most credentialed cardiologists in Guntur and Andhra Pradesh
- FESC certification demonstrates adherence to international treatment standards
- Gold Medal in M.D. General Medicine from Osmania Medical College
- Affordable cardiac care with transparent pricing
